title: Align scorecard criterion columns
description: Criterion rows do not reserve a fixed width for IDs or scores, so state, score, and justification text shift horizontally when IDs or scores have different lengths. Add regression coverage and render these as stable columns across terminal widths.
acceptance_criteria: Rows with mixed-length IDs and scores align the state, score, and justification columns; rendered lines remain within the requested width; the installed scorecard reproduces the corrected layout.
close_reason: Fixed stable ID and score column widths, added alignment regression coverage, passed tests/build, and verified the installed renderer against the reported card.
